Updated: 15:26 EDT

Who cares about her? want we need is a General Election NOW

Angela Rayner put Labour chaos behind her today as she was spotted enjoying Britain's sweltering heatwave on the beach in Brighton. The former deputy prime minister, 46, was seen soaking up the sun on Bank Holiday Monday with her topless ex-MP boyfriend Sam Tarry, 43. The casually-dressed pair were photographed setting up beach chairs as they joined thousands of others who thronged the South Coast. It came as the UK saw record-breaking temperatures with a searing 34.8C recorded in Kew Gardens, south-west London. This exceeded the previous hottest May day of 32.8C in 1944 and also broke the Bank Holiday record of 33.3C in August 2019. Ms Rayner owns an £800,000 seaside apartment in Hove, East Sussex, and has previously been pictured sipping a rosé on the nearby beach.

Radacanu was never as good as she was made out to be. She had the tournament of her life with the 2021 US Open combined with a huge slice of luck in not having to play a single top 10 player throughout the entire tournament. You can only beat what's in front of you, as the tired old cliche goes, but there are two other hugely damning stats. Firstly, she's never won another tournament since. Hasn't even reached a final. Secondly, she's only ever beaten three top ten players in her entire career. Face it, Emma is a top 50 player at best who has been convinced - whether by herself or by others - that she's more. And every time it goes wrong, it couldn't possibly be own lack of ability and it must be the coach's fault. I'll be amazed if she ever has a deep run in a grand slam again.

Beautiful reunion - Well done that team x

A heartwarming video has captured the moment a lost elephant calf is reunited with her missing family. The four-month-old orphan was separated from her herd and wandered, by chance, into a tourist camp in Northern Kenya. Unsure what to do, staff tied the calf to a tree and called a local elephant research group, led by Professor George Wittemyer of Colorado State University. Scouring the Samburu National Reserve, Professor Wittemyer and his team finally tracked down a group of elephants they were almost certain was her family.

Siobhan Whyte can still hear the piercing screams bursting from her five-year-old grandson after telling him that his doting mother had not only been hurt - but would never be coming home again. 'That little child just broke and screamed out,' says Siobhan, the grieving mother of Rhiannon Whyte, who was stabbed to death with a screwdriver as she waited for her train home on October 20, 2024. 'We told him that we tried to save his mum, but that a bad man had hurt her and she'd have to go to heaven.' Rhiannon was just 27 when her life was cut short in the cruellest of ways. The mother of one had just finished a late shift working at a hotel housing asylum seekers when she was ambushed by one of its residents.

  • Radacanu was never as good as she was made out to be. She had the tournament of her life with the 2021 US Open combined with a huge slice of luck in not having to play a single top 10 player throughout the entire tournament. You can only beat what's in front of you, as the tired old cliche goes, but there are two other hugely damning stats. Firstly, she's never won another tournament since. Hasn't even reached a final. Secondly, she's only ever beaten three top ten players in her entire career. Face it, Emma is a top 50 player at best who has been convinced - whether by herself or by others - that she's more. And every time it goes wrong, it couldn't possibly be own lack of ability and it must be the coach's fault. I'll be amazed if she ever has a deep run in a grand slam again.

A British man facing trial over the death of a bouncer at a former TOWIE star Elliot Wright's Spanish restaurant has gone on the run. An arrest warrant has been issued for Harry Saunders, 35, after he vanished following his release on bail during a court manslaughter probe into the incident at Olivia's La Cala near Fuengirola. Bouncer Jose Rafael Pisani Prado died in hospital on April 16 2023, following a tussle at the popular Costa del Sol eatery just hours earlier.

Shocking footage captured the moment a plane crashed into a paraglider before tearing through her parachute, sending her spiralling through the air.  A video clip recorded by thrill-seeker Sabrina, 44, shows her almost being killed by a small aircraft racing over the Schmittenhöhe mountain on the eastern end of the Kitzbühel Alps in Austria.   • I reluctantly selected the documentary to watch last night, not being a fan, but like most, was there when each record was released. Gosh, I never knew just how gruelling her schedule was and how hard she worked, at a very young age receiving deriding criticism. Then late on in the documentary, she candidly discusses her cancer diagnosis and treatment, how it affected her personal life and her career. This was the point I could identify with Kylie. I too was diagnosed with breast cancer and endured the gruelling treatment. 20 months later, and I'm still not the person I was, no stamina, no energy and in pain. I never thought I'd say this about Kylie, but she deserves all the accolades, all the adulation. She's more than earned it.

How can that price for a hotel stay be justified ???!!! Ridiculous ,and anyone who pays it must be out of their tiny minds.

Housed within a UNESCO-listed 17th-century canal palace, the Waldorf Astoria Amsterdam is the epitome of five-star luxury. It features 93 plush rooms and suites spread across six neighbouring buildings, as well as private dining areas, the city's largest private hotel garden and a grand staircase designed by an architect who once worked under King Louis XIV. With uniquely designed suites costing over £8,000 per night, it's a celebrity favourite - and it's rumored to be Harry Styles' home base during his 'Together, Together' tour.
  • 46 comments
  • share The £7k-a-night Amsterdam hotel Harry Styles is staying at on his tour
